hypothesis.title: Smoke validation of entropy-condition provenance
hypothesis.statement: The local MVP records a complete, auditable execution under both registered entropy conditions.
hypothesis.null_statement: This smoke run does not establish a scientific effect.
hypothesis.success_criteria: Complete ten balanced trial slots with complete provenance and a resumable interruption.

configuration.note: Operating-system entropy; not a claim of specialised hardware randomness.

prompts.content: Explain the following concept clearly in two short paragraphs: {topic}

experiment.name: Local MVP live smoke validation
experiment.description: Balanced five-per-condition live validation. The deterministic control is the reproducible PRNG entropy stream and derived-seed sequence, not a guarantee of identical LM Studio outputs; LM Studio seed support is best-effort.

prompt_variables.topic: the role of reproducibility in scientific research
